# terrible_community_general_ldap_passwd (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `passwd` (String) The (plaintext) password to be set for `dn`.

### Read-Only

- `modlist` (String) List of modified parameters.
